user.title: Select sensor
user.description: Select a cumulative kWh sensor. Daily "today" meters and lifetime totals both work; use the same kind consistently when comparing to other energy entities (see integration readme).

data_description.source_entity: Monotonic cumulative energy (e.g. sensor.today_load or sensor.total_pv_generation). Mixing today vs lifetime bases across related sensors risks inconsistent comparisons.

windows.title: Add window
windows.description: Name the window and define the start and end times. You can add, edit and delete windows later via the "configure" menu.

add_window.title: Add new window
add_window.description: Name the window and define the start and end times.

edit_window.title: Edit window
edit_window.description: To remove a time range, clear its start time, end time, or both. Keep at least one valid range while finishing setup. To remove the whole window later, open Configure, edit the window, clear all ranges, and confirm when prompted.

window_setup.title: Add window
window_setup.description: Define a window and one or more time ranges.

window_entities.title: Select entities
window_entities.description: Choose one or more entities to track in this window.

configure_menu.title: Configure window
configure_menu.description: Pick an option below. You can edit the window name, time ranges, import/export rates, or energy sensors.

manage_windows_empty.title: Configure window
manage_windows_empty.description: No windows yet. Add a window during initial setup.

error.window_start_after_end: Start time must be earlier than end time.
error.at_least_one_window: At least one window is required (start time before end time).
error.range_start_before_previous_end: Each range must start at or after the previous range's end time. Add ranges in chronological order (earliest first).
error.duplicate_window_name: Window name already exists. Use a unique window name.
error.invalid_time: Set the window time to be later than all previous windows
error.source_already_in_use: Sensor already in use, please edit {entry_title}.
error.setup_failed: Failed to create the window(s). Check the server logs for details and try again.

abort.already_configured: This configuration is already set up.

init.title: Configure window
init.description: Pick an option below. You can edit the window name, time ranges, import/export rates, or energy sensors.

manage_windows_empty.title: Configure window
manage_windows_empty.description: No windows yet. Add a window during initial setup.

source_entity_confirm.title: Manage energy source(s)
source_entity_confirm.description: Changing the source will **permanently delete all historical data** for the current source. The source name will be re-used.

confirm_delete_window.title: Delete window
confirm_delete_window.description: All ranges were removed for **{window_name}**. Confirm to delete this window.

confirm_delete.title: Delete window
confirm_delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete **{window_name}**? This cannot be undone.

add_window.title: Add new window
add_window.description: Name the window and define the start and end times.

edit_window.title: Edit window
edit_window.description: To remove a time range, clear its start time and end time.

error.window_start_after_end: Start time must be earlier than end time.
error.at_least_one_window: At least one window is required.
error.range_start_before_previous_end: Each range must start at or after the previous range's end time. Add ranges in chronological order (earliest first).
error.duplicate_window_name: Window name already exists. Use a unique window name.
error.invalid_time: Set the window time to be later than all previous windows
error.source_already_in_use: Sensor already in use, please edit {entry_title}.
error.remove_previous_but_source_unchanged: Same energy source selected. To delete current windows, please do it via the "Manage windows" menu.

abort.no_source: No source configured. Please remove and re-add the integration.
